summary: Task 012 is complete in substance. The owner edit flow exposes explicit publish/unpublish actions, the public homepage reads only published notes, the slug route serves only published notes and 404s otherwise, `/app` remains the only auth-gated surface while `/` and `/notes/[slug]` stay publicly reachable, and the provided `npm run verify` gate passed.
satisfied_exit_criteria: Publishing is implemented explicitly from the owner note editor and published notes are surfaced on `/`.
Published notes are reachable by `/notes/[slug]`, and the public note page reads only published records.
Unpublishing clears public visibility on both the homepage and slug route; unpublished notes resolve to 404 on the public note page.
The required command `npm run verify` passed in the deterministic check summary.
